hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象；【AI】惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系；【CRYPTO】随着莫斯科扫清市场道路，俄罗斯最大银行计划推出加密钱包。

items.title: Warsh faces multiple alternative inflation signs as Fed charts new course
items.summary: Warsh has said that inflation is a "choice." The same could also be true of how inflation is measured.
items.title_zh: 随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象
items.summary_zh: 沃什曾表示，通货膨胀是一种“选择”。通货膨胀的衡量方式也可能如此。

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
items.title_zh: 惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: HP Inc. 扩大其 OpenAI Frontier 合作伙伴关系，在客户体验、软件开发和企业运营领域部署 AI。

items.title: Russia's largest bank plans crypto wallet launch as Moscow clears market path
items.summary: Services will integrate into "Sberbank Online" and "SberInvestments" once the "On Digital Currency and Digital Rights" bill takes effect in September.
items.title_zh: 随着莫斯科扫清市场道路，俄罗斯最大银行计划推出加密钱包
items.summary_zh: 一旦“数字货币和数字权利”法案于 9 月生效，服务将整合到“Sberbank Online”和“SberInvestments”中。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: Huge crowds fill Tehran streets for Khamenei's funeral procession
items.summary: Many people were waving Iranian flags and red banners symbolising vengeance for the former supreme leader's war death.
items.title_zh: 德黑兰街道挤满了大批人群参加哈梅内伊的送葬队伍
items.summary_zh: 许多人挥舞着伊朗国旗和红色横幅，象征着为这位前最高领袖的战争死亡复仇。

items.title: Cantor says Strategy's recovery hinges on restoring STRC to par
items.summary: Bringing Strategy's preferred shares back to $100 is key to restarting Strategy's capital engine, the bank said, with repeated management actions expected to support both preferred and common shareholders.
items.title_zh: Cantor 表示 Strategy 的复苏取决于将 STRC 恢复到标准水平
items.summary_zh: 该银行表示，将Strategy的优先股恢复至100美元是重启Strategy资本引擎的关键，预计管理层将不断采取行动支持优先股和普通股股东。

items.title: SpaceX's Nasdaq 100 inclusion comes with a historical warning
items.summary: The largest IPO ever enters the Nasdaq 100. Previous additions like Palantir and Strategy saw volatility after the index inclusion rather than the start of new rallies.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 入选纳斯达克 100 指数，同时也带来了历史性警告
items.summary_zh: 这是纳斯达克 100 指数有史以来规模最大的 IPO。Palantir 和 Strategy 等之前加入的公司在纳入指数后出现了波动，而不是开始新的反弹。

items.title: Bitmine added another $74 million in ether as Tom Lee bets on Clarity Act boost
items.summary: The second-largest digital asset treasury increased its buying pace, while Strategy sold a chunk of its bitcoin holdings.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 押注《澄清法案》的推动，Bitmine 又追加了 7400 万美元的以太坊
items.summary_zh: 第二大数字资产国库增加了购买步伐，而Strategy则出售了其持有的大部分比特币。

items.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy dramatically ups pace of bitcoin sales, raising $216 million
items.summary: The company sold 3,588 bitcoin last week to replenish its dollar reserves for dividends on its preferred stock.
items.title_zh: Michael Saylor 的策略大幅加快了比特币销售步伐，筹集了 2.16 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该公司上周出售了 3,588 比特币，以补充其优先股股息的美元储备。

items.title: U.S. inflation outlook underpins bitcoin bulls after best week since March
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for July 6, 2026
items.title_zh: 美国通胀前景支撑比特币多头，经历了三月份以来最好的一周
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 7 月 6 日天气预报

items.title: Russia’s largest bank Sber targets early December crypto wallet launch: report
items.summary: Sberbank plans a crypto wallet and digital depository in Sber apps by early December pending Russia’s new digital asset law.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯最大银行 Sber 计划 12 月初推出加密钱包：报告
items.summary_zh: Sberbank 计划在 12 月初之前在 Sber 应用程序中建立加密钱包和数字存管，等待俄罗斯新的数字资产法的出台。

items.title: Strategy sells 3,588 BTC for $216 million, with total bitcoin holdings still underwater
items.summary: Strategy's total holdings account for more than 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth around $52.3 billion.
items.title_zh: Strategy以2.16亿美元出售3,588枚比特币，比特币持有总量仍处于水下
items.summary_zh: Strategy 的总持有量占 2100 万枚比特币供应上限的 4% 以上，价值约 523 亿美元。

items.title: How Sovereign Wealth Funds Invest in Digital Assets
items.summary: Sovereign wealth funds invest in digital assets mainly through regulated vehicles: spot bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs), publicly traded companies with crypto exposure, blockchain infrastructure firms, and venture capital funds. Direct ownership of bitcoin or other tokens re
items.title_zh: 主权财富基金如何投资数字资产
items.summary_zh: 主权财富基金主要通过受监管的工具投资数字资产：现货比特币交易所交易基金（ETF）、拥有加密货币敞口的上市公司、区块链基础设施公司和风险投资基金。直接拥有比特币或其他代币

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: Klarna seeks U.S. bank charter in latest push beyond buy now, pay later
items.summary: Klarna joins a wave of fintech and crypto firms seeking entry to the traditional banking system.
items.title_zh: 克拉纳寻求美国银行牌照，以超越“先买后付”的最新举措
items.summary_zh: Klarna 加入了寻求进入传统银行系统的金融科技和加密货币公司浪潮。

items.title: Citadel's hedge funds post broad first-half gains, top performing strategy sidesteps quant selloff
items.summary: The hedge fund firm's tactical trading fund, which combines discretionary equity investing with quantitative strategies, climbed 14.3% through the end of June.
items.title_zh: Citadel 的对冲基金上半年大幅上涨，表现最佳的策略避开了量化抛售
items.summary_zh: 这家对冲基金公司的战术交易基金将全权委托股票投资与量化策略相结合，截至 6 月底上涨了 14.3%。

items.title: Prolific tech analyst Dan Ives is exiting Wedbush for a new venture
items.summary: Ives said the new firm will seek to build what he described as a "modern merchant bank."
items.title_zh: 多产科技分析师丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 即将离开韦德布什 (Wedbush) 前往一家新公司
items.summary_zh: 艾夫斯表示，新公司将寻求建立他所说的“现代商业银行”。

items.title: Inflation peaked in May as energy prices fell in June, Kalshi traders think
items.summary: Speculators on the prediction market platform give less than 30% odds to inflation peaking above 4.2% in 2026.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，随着能源价格在 6 月份下跌，通胀在 5 月份达到顶峰
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的投机者认为，2026 年通胀率达到 4.2% 以上峰值的可能性不到 30%。

items.title: Xi touts China Communist Party's global influence in speech marking 105th anniversary
items.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke Wednesday to commemorate the 105th anniversary of the ruling Communist Party of China.
items.title_zh: 习近平在庆祝建党105周年讲话中宣扬中国共产党的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: 中国国家主席习近平周三发表讲话，纪念中国共产党成立105周年。

items.title: Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review Balogun ban
items.summary: United States President Donald Trump says Fifa "made the right decision" to suspend Folarin Balogun's one-match ban, adding that otherwise, it would have left a "big stain" on the World Cup.
items.title_zh: 特朗普证实他要求国际足联审查巴洛贡禁令
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，国际足联暂停对福拉林·巴洛贡的一场比赛禁令“做出了正确的决定”，并补充说，否则，这将给世界杯留下“巨大污点”。

items.title: Ukraine warns of interceptor missile shortage as 21 killed in Kyiv region
items.summary: President Zelensky says Sunday's "massive Russian attack" on Kyiv consisted of 68 missiles and 351 strike drones.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰警告拦截导弹短缺 基辅地区21人死亡
items.summary_zh: 泽连斯基总统表示，周日俄罗斯对基辅发动的“大规模袭击”包括 68 枚导弹和 351 架无人机。

items.title: Wildfire in southern France forces evacuation of 10,000 people
items.summary: Tour de France organisers ban spectators from stage three as a wildfire hits the Pyrénées-Orientales region.
items.title_zh: 法国南部山火迫使10,000人疏散
items.summary_zh: 由于野火袭击东比利牛斯地区，环法自行车赛组织者禁止观众观看第三赛段。

items.title: Australian PM apologises for 'inappropriate' comments about Kylie Minogue
items.summary: Albanese has apologised 'unequivocally' after his remarks prompted a backlash.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚总理为凯莉·米洛的“不当”言论道歉
items.summary_zh: 阿尔巴内塞的言论引发强烈反对后，他已“明确”道歉。

items.title: The Funeral of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
items.summary: Iran’s new leaders are commemorating Ayatollah Khamenei, who was killed on the first day of the U.S.-Israeli war against the country, with a funeral unlike any other in the country’s recent history.
items.title_zh: 伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉·阿里·哈梅内伊的葬礼
items.summary_zh: 伊朗新领导人正在纪念阿亚图拉哈梅内伊，他在美以战争的第一天被杀，葬礼与该国近代历史上的任何一次葬礼都不同。

items.title: Securitize eyes acquisitions with $400 million war chest after going public, CEO says
items.summary: Following its NYSE debut, Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo said the firm wants to expand its institutional tokenization platform rather than buy competitors.
items.title_zh: 首席执行官表示，上市后将斥资 4 亿美元进行收购
items.summary_zh: 在纽约证券交易所首次亮相后，Securitize 首席执行官卡洛斯·多明戈表示，该公司希望扩大其机构代币化平台，而不是收购竞争对手。

items.title: Crypto bounces back from the brink as altcoin optimism returns despite pockets of weakness
items.summary: BTC holds at $62,800 after last week's brush with $58,000, while LIT surges 50% and the Altcoin Season indicator hits its highest reading in three months.
items.title_zh: 尽管存在一些疲软，但随着山寨币乐观情绪的回归，加密货币从边缘反弹
items.summary_zh: BTC 在上周触及 58,000 美元后维持在 62,800 美元，而 LIT 飙升 50%，山寨币季节指标达到三个月来的最高水平。

items.title: TeraWulf signs 20-year data center lease with Anthropic expected to generate $19 billion in revenue
items.summary: Anthropic will lease at TeraWulf's Justified Data site in Hawesville, Kentucky, which is expected to provide 401 MW of IT load.
items.title_zh: TeraWulf 与 Anthropic 签署为期 20 年的数据中心租约，预计将产生 190 亿美元的收入
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 将租赁 TeraWulf 位于肯塔基州霍斯维尔的 Justified Data 站点，预计将提供 401 MW 的 IT 负载。

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
items.title_zh: 核心转储流行病学：修复 18 年前的错误
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 工程师使用大规模核心转储分析来调试罕见的基础设施崩溃，发现硬件故障和长期存在的软件错误。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Australia space agency has found 'likely source' of mystery space balls
items.summary: The agency says that they "appear to be pressure vessels from a space launch vehicle".
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚航天局发现神秘太空球的“可能来源”
items.summary_zh: 该机构表示，它们“似乎是来自太空运载火箭的压力容器”。

items.title: Iran Live Updates: Hundreds of Thousands Attend Ayatollah’s Funeral Procession
items.summary: Huge crowds of mourners came to view the casket of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was exalted by some and despised by others. He was killed four months ago at the start of the U.S.-Israeli attacks.
items.title_zh: 伊朗实时更新：数十万人参加阿亚图拉的葬礼游行
items.summary_zh: 大批哀悼者前来瞻仰阿亚图拉·阿里·哈梅内伊的灵柩，他受到一些人的赞扬，也被另一些人鄙视。四个月前，他在美以袭击开始时被杀。

items.title: Deadly Russian Strikes Rock Kyiv on Eve of NATO Summit
items.summary: Ballistic missiles were fired into the capital of Ukraine as Russia launched its second major attack in less than a week. At least 12 people were killed, officials said.
items.title_zh: 北约峰会前夕，俄罗斯致命袭击基辅岩石
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯在不到一周内发动了第二次重大袭击，弹道导弹袭击了乌克兰首都。官员称，至少有12人死亡。

items.title: China Test Fires Long-Range Ballistic Missile in the Pacific
items.summary: China’s firing of a submarine-launched missile came as Australia secured more defense deals with Pacific Island nations. Countries expressed concern about the test.
items.title_zh: 中国在太平洋试射远程弹道导弹
items.summary_zh: 中国发射潜射导弹之际，澳大利亚与太平洋岛国达成了更多防务协议。各国对此次测试表示担忧。

items.title: Bitcoin's Sharpe Ratio slides to lowest since 2022. Here's what it means.
items.summary: A reading that negative means investors would have been better off in risk-free assets like 10-year U.S. Treasuries.
items.title_zh: 比特币的夏普比率跌至 2022 年以来的最低水平。这意味着什么。
items.summary_zh: 读数为负意味着投资者购买十年期美国国债等无风险资产会获得更好的收益。

items.title: Bitmine’s Tom Lee ties ether strength to Clarity Act odds as treasury nears 5% of Ethereum’s total supply
items.summary: Bitmine acquired 42,197 ether worth an estimated $74 million last week, lifting its treasury to over 5.7 million ETH.
items.title_zh: 随着财政部接近以太坊总供应量的 5%，Bitmine 的 Tom Lee 将以太币的强势与《澄清法案》的赔率联系起来
items.summary_zh: Bitmine 上周收购了 42,197 个以太币，价值估计为 7400 万美元，使其库存增加到超过 570 万个 ETH。

items.title: ‘Any signs of life?’ Bernstein holds ‘ambitious’ $150K year-end bitcoin target despite 54% drawdown
items.summary: Bernstein says bitcoin's 54% drawdown is milder than past cycles, retaining its "ambitious" $150K year-end target.
items.title_zh: “还有生命迹象吗？”尽管比特币缩水 54%，伯恩斯坦仍坚持“雄心勃勃”的 15 万美元年底比特币目标
items.summary_zh: Bernstein 表示，比特币 54% 的跌幅比过去的周期要温和，保留了其“雄心勃勃的”15 万美元的年终目标。

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
items.title_zh: GeneBench-Pro 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GeneBench-Pro，这是一个使用复杂的真实数据集测试基因组学、生物学和科学研究中人工智能性能的新基准。

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
items.title_zh: 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol：下一代模型
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 预览了 GPT-5.6 Sol，这是一种下一代模型，在编码、科学和网络安全方面具有更强的能力，并配有最先进的安全堆栈。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.title: 🤗 Kernels: Major Updates
items.title_zh: 🤗 内核：主要更新

items.title: Featuring Every Eval Ever Results on Hugging Face Model Pages
items.title_zh: 在拥抱脸部模型页面上展示所有评估结果

items.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
items.title_zh: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 加速 Transformer 微调

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 2026 年 6 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
items.summary: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.
items.title_zh: 世界杯使得预测市场量飙升至历史新高
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 的交易量在 6 月份均创下历史新高。新的预测市场平台 Rothera 也能够管理 20 亿美元的交易量。

items.title: Don't throw away your shot to speak to an AI Alexander Hamilton at Boston's new finance museum
items.summary: Nearly a decade after leaving its former home, the Museum of American Finance is opening its new doors to the public.
items.title_zh: 不要放弃在波士顿新金融博物馆与人工智能亚历山大·汉密尔顿交谈的机会
items.summary_zh: 离开旧址近十年后，美国金融博物馆向公众敞开了新的大门。

items.title: SpaceX may emerge as ultimate blueprint for new wave of mega-cap IPOs
items.summary: "It would not surprise me at all to see a similar dynamic play out with some of these [IPOs] set to come in the months ahead," the Kathmere Capital CIO says.
items.title_zh: SpaceX可能成为新一波大型IPO的最终蓝图
items.summary_zh: Kathmere Capital 首席信息官表示：“如果在未来几个月内看到其中一些 [IPO] 出现类似的动态，我一点也不感到惊讶。”

items.title: Alibaba-affiliate Ant Group rushes into humanoid robots with a dozen deals in 18 months
items.summary: Ant has led a 500 million yuan ($73.59 million) funding round in humanoid robotics company Zeroth, the start-up announced Thursday.
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴旗下蚂蚁集团在 18 个月内完成十几笔交易，进军人形机器人领域
items.summary_zh: 仿人机器人公司 Zeroth 周四宣布，蚂蚁金服已领投该公司一轮 5 亿元人民币（7359 万美元）的融资。

items.title: 'I ate ketchup and cheese,' says Venezuelan girl trapped under quake rubble for 32 hours
items.summary: Fabiana was trapped in the rubble of a 10-storey residential building after two earthquakes rocked Venezuela in June.
items.title_zh: 被困地震废墟下32小时的委内瑞拉女孩说：“我吃了番茄酱和奶酪”
items.summary_zh: 六月委内瑞拉发生两次地震后，法比亚娜被困在一栋 10 层住宅楼的废墟中。

items.title: Sri Lanka prison riots leave 26 dead and more than 100 injured
items.summary: The two days of violence at Negombo Prison are the worst prison riots in the country in years.
items.title_zh: 斯里兰卡监狱骚乱已造成26人死亡、100多人受伤
items.summary_zh: 尼甘布监狱这两天的暴力事件是该国多年来最严重的监狱骚乱。

items.title: Marine Le Pen appeal verdict: Why this moment matters for France
items.summary: The leader of France's National Rally leads the opinion polls ahead of the 2027 presidential election and will now find out if she can stand.
items.title_zh: 马琳·勒庞上诉判决：为什么这一刻对法国很重要
items.summary_zh: 法国全国集会领袖在 2027 年总统选举前的民意调查中领先，现在将看看她是否能参选。

items.title: Super Typhoon Bavi makes landfall on US Pacific islands with huge wind gusts
items.summary: The storm, with winds of nearly 290km/h (180mph) and gusts of 350km/h, is lashing the island of Rota.
items.title_zh: 超强台风“巴威”登陆美国太平洋岛屿 带来阵风
items.summary_zh: 这场风暴的风速接近 290 公里/小时（180 英里/小时），阵风高达 350 公里/小时，正在袭击罗塔岛。

items.title: Erdogan-Trump Friendship Can Help NATO, Turkey’s Foreign Minister Says
items.summary: In an interview, Turkey’s top diplomat, Hakan Fidan, said the relationship between President Recep Tayyip Erdogan and President Trump could ease NATO tensions.
items.title_zh: 土耳其外长表示，埃尔多安与特朗普的友谊可以帮助北约
items.summary_zh: 土耳其最高外交官哈坎·菲丹在接受采访时表示，雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安总统和特朗普总统之间的关系可以缓解北约紧张局势。

items.title: With $8 Billion in Venezuelan Oil Money, U.S. Gives $300 Million in Quake Aid
items.summary: In 2010, there was a huge U.S. aid effort after a quake in Haiti. Today, U.S. officials say they oversee billions in Venezuelan oil revenue, but aid is less.
items.title_zh: 美国利用委内瑞拉80亿美元石油资金提供3亿美元地震援助
items.summary_zh: 2010年，海地发生地震后，美国提供了大量援助。如今，美国官员表示，他们监管着委内瑞拉数十亿美元的石油收入，但援助却较少。

items.title: Former Syrian Officials Found Guilty in Torture of Pro-Democracy Protesters
items.summary: The case against the two men, who have been living in Austria since 2015, was one of the first that the country has brought under the principle of universal jurisdiction.
items.title_zh: 叙利亚前官员因酷刑亲民主抗议者而被判有罪
items.summary_zh: 这两名男子自 2015 年以来一直居住在奥地利，这是该国根据普遍管辖权原则提起的首批案件之一。

items.title: Fatigue, Tension, Joy: England Pulls a World Cup All-Nighter
items.summary: The game against Mexico started at 2 a.m. in Britain. Pubs were allowed to stay open unusually late for fans to share the drama together.
items.title_zh: 疲劳、紧张、喜悦：英格兰队通宵达旦地参加世界杯
items.summary_zh: 对阵墨西哥的比赛于凌晨 2 点在英国开始。酒吧被允许营业到很晚，以便粉丝们一起分享戏剧。

items.title: Ukraine Remade Air Defense, but Russia Has Changed Its Attacks
items.summary: Ukraine has changed how militaries use Patriot systems. But recent attacks prove that clever adaptations cannot overcome a shortage of interceptors.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰重建防空系统，但俄罗斯改变了攻击方式
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰改变了军队使用爱国者系统的方式。但最近的攻击证明，巧妙的调整并不能克服拦截器的短缺问题。

items.title: Sites That Report Venezuela’s Missing Rise Far From Quake Zone
items.summary: Despite problems like duplicate submissions, tallies gathered by the websites have been cited by news organizations and critics of the Venezuelan government’s disaster response.
items.title_zh: 报告委内瑞拉远离地震区的隆起失踪的网站
items.summary_zh: 尽管存在重复提交等问题，但新闻机构和委内瑞拉政府灾难响应的批评者仍然引用了这些网站收集的统计数据。

items.summary_zh: 事件发生后，该协议的 SUMR 代币下跌了 18% 以上。

items.title: Ripple secures full MiCA CASP authorization for crypto services across 30 EEA countries
items.summary: Ripple secured full MiCA CASP authorization from Luxembourg for regulated crypto services across all 30 European Economic Area countries.
items.title_zh: Ripple 获得 MiCA CASP 跨 30 个欧洲经济区国家加密服务的全面授权
items.summary_zh: Ripple 获得了卢森堡的 MiCA CASP 全面授权，可在所有 30 个欧洲经济区国家提供受监管的加密服务。

items.title: DeFi protocol Summer Finance exploited for $6 million; analysts point to flash loan attack
items.summary: The attacker reportedly used a $65.4 million flash loan to obtain a $70.9 million redemption on Summer.fi's Lazy Summer Protocol.
items.title_zh: DeFi 协议 Summer Finance 被利用价值 600 万美元；分析师指出闪贷攻击
items.summary_zh: 据报道，攻击者使用 6540 万美元的快速贷款在 Summer.fi 的 Lazy Summer Protocol 上获得了 7090 万美元的赎回。

items.title: South Korea develops crypto-specific procedures for asset seizures and liquidation: report
items.summary: The amendments aim to formalize how courts handle the forced execution of civil judgments against cryptocurrency holdings.

items.summary_zh: 这些修正案旨在正式确定法院如何处理针对加密货币持有的强制执行民事判决。

items.summary_zh: Farage 已经因 Tether 利益相关者 Christopher Harbourne 未公开的 500 万英镑礼物而面临议会标准调查。

items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…

items.summary_zh: 使用 Google 搜索和购物中的 AI 工具发现二手乐谱。

items.title: MIT in the media: Innovating and educating for the next 250 years of America
items.summary: During a "Washington Post Live" panel discussion with ASU President Michael Crow, President Sally Kornbluth explored how universities are preparing the next generation of scientists to lead in America’s rapidly changing technological landscape.

items.summary_zh: 在与亚利桑那州立大学校长迈克尔·克劳 (Michael Crow) 举行的“华盛顿邮报直播”小组讨论中，校长萨莉·科恩布鲁斯 (Sally Kornbluth) 探讨了大学如何培养下一代科学家，以引领美国快速变化的技术格局。

items.title: Q&A: What is agentic AI today, and what do we want it to be?
items.summary: Computer scientist Phillip Isola cuts through the hype to explain how AI agents work and what the future might hold for this rapidly advancing technology.

items.title: 3 Questions: Beyond data-driven aesthetics
items.summary: In a new Keller Gallery exhibition, Alexandros Haridis SM ’17, PhD ’22 traces centuries of ideas about aesthetic judgment and explores how design can make complex computational systems visible.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：超越数据驱动的美学
items.summary_zh: 在凯勒画廊的新展览中，Alexandros Haridis SM '17、PhD '22 追溯了几个世纪以来有关审美判断的想法，并探索了设计如何使复杂的计算系统变得可见。

items.title: MIT in the media: Exploring how curiosity-driven science is an essential ingredient in America’s success
items.summary: “Scientific American” showcases the history and future of America’s scientific engine, highlighting promising young scientists and icons at MIT and beyond.
